rationale: No conflict. Gov't Code §2155.061 governs comptroller purchasing of goods and services for state agencies; it is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption.
quote: The comptroller shall acquire by purchase, lease, rental, or another manner all goods and services for a state agency
_note: Rule text concerns state procurement; proposed homestead exemption change has no bearing on this provision.
